package.title: Honeymoon Romance — Munnar, Thekkady, Alleppey & Kovalam

highlights.text: Complete honeymoon circuit — Munnar tea romance, Thekkady spice wilderness, Alleppey houseboat, Kovalam cliffs
Periyar Lake boating and VIP Kathakali cultural evening in Thekkady
Private Kettuvallam houseboat with Karimeen Pollichathu and candlelit deck dinner
Kovalam Lighthouse Beach sundowners and Ayurvedic spa options
Honeymoon cake, floral bed decoration, and TRAGUIN candlelit valley dining
Private premium vehicle with TRAGUIN 24/7 honeymoon concierge

itinerary.title: Honeymoon Romance — Munnar, Thekkady, Alleppey & Kovalam
itinerary.tagline: Romance Across Kerala — Hills, Spices, Backwaters & Sea
itinerary.overview: TRAGUIN's ultimate Kerala honeymoon weaves aromatic Munnar tea plantations, Thekkady wildlife mysteries, an exclusive Alleppey backwater cruise, and dramatic Kovalam clifftop coastlines — secluded privacy, candlelit dinners, and premium handpicked stays throughout.
itinerary.seo_title: KL-006 | Honeymoon Romance Kerala | TRAGUIN Munnar Thekkady Kovalam Tour
itinerary.seo_description: Luxury 05 Nights / 06 Days Kerala honeymoon package (KL-006) covering Munnar, Thekkady, Alleppey houseboat, and Kovalam with premium romance experiences.

days.title: Cochin Arrival to Munnar — Misty Hills Welcome
days.description: Arrive at Cochin where a TRAGUIN representative welcomes you with traditional garlands. Drive toward Munnar through Cheeyappara and Valara Waterfalls, check into your ultra-luxury resort, and unwind on your private balcony overlooking the clouds.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Cheeyappara & Valara Waterfalls, Adimali Spice Markets, Scenic Mountain Drive
Evening Experience: Private candlelight dining orientation overlooking the mist-clad valley
Optional Activities: Traditional Kerala Ayurvedic welcome massage at the resort
Overnight Stay: Munnar (Premium Resort)

days.title: Munnar Sightseeing — Tea Estate Trails
days.description: Visit Mattupetty Dam and Lake, Echo Point, Kundala Lake, private Tata Tea Plantation walk with tea tasting, and Eravikulam National Park — home of the Nilgiri Tahr.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Eravikulam National Park, Mattupetty Dam, Echo Point, Kundala Lake, Tea Museum
Evening Experience: Leisurely walk through colonial-era Munnar town market for rare spices and handmade chocolates
Optional Activities: Speed boating at Mattupetty; private couples' photo session in tea gardens
Overnight Stay: Munnar (Premium Resort)

days.title: Munnar to Thekkady — Wildlife & Spice Odyssey
days.description: Drive through the Western Ghats to Thekkady. Enjoy an immersive spice plantation tour, tranquil Periyar Lake boating in the Tiger Reserve, and VIP Kathakali and Kalaripayattu cultural shows.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Periyar Lake Boating, Spice Plantation Tour, Periyar Tiger Reserve
Evening Experience: VIP seating at local theatre for Kalaripayattu and Kathakali cultural shows
Optional Activities: Elephant interaction program or guided jungle night patrol walk
Overnight Stay: Thekkady (Luxury Spice Resort)

days.title: Thekkady to Alleppey — Private Backwater Cruise
days.description: Step onto your exclusive private luxury Kettuvallam houseboat. Glide along Vembanad Lake and palm-fringed canals with Karimeen Pollichathu lunch onboard — the centerpiece of your Kerala honeymoon.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Vembanad Lake, Alleppey Backwater Canals, Paddy Field Views
Evening Experience: Breathtaking sunset from the houseboat deck followed by romantic candlelit dinner
Optional Activities: Traditional village canoe cruise to explore narrow water alleys
Overnight Stay: Alleppey (Private Luxury Houseboat — Anchored in Serene Backwaters)

days.title: Alleppey to Kovalam — Sun-Kissed Cliffs
days.description: Cruise back to the jetty after breakfast and drive south to Kovalam. Check into a spectacular clifftop resort and relax on Lighthouse Beach, Hawa Beach, or Samudra Beach.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Kovalam Beach Circuit, Vizhinjam Lighthouse, Marine Aquarium
Evening Experience: Private seaside sundowner cocktail session followed by gourmet seafood dinner
Overnight Stay: Kovalam (Luxury Beach Resort)
Meals Included: Breakfast & Dinner

days.title: Kovalam to Trivandrum — Departure
days.description: Conclude with a relaxed ocean breakfast. Brief Trivandrum city tour of Sree Padmanabhaswamy Temple before transfer to Trivandrum International Airport or railway station.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Sree Padmanabhaswamy Temple (outer view), Napier Museum
Evening Experience: TRAGUIN farewell assistance at Trivandrum Airport or railway station
Overnight Stay: Not Applicable (Departure Day)
Meals Included: Premium Buffet Breakfast

inclusions.text: Premium accommodation at handpicked Kerala resorts, heritage hotels, and luxury houseboats
Daily lavish breakfasts and authentic Kerala multi-cuisine dinners (MAPAI plan)
Private chauffeur-driven AC Innova Crysta for all transfers, hill stations, and sightseeing
TRAGUIN 24/7 dedicated elite guest relationship manager assistance
Personalized welcome kit with herbal tea, fresh fruits, mineral water, and houseboat transfers where applicable
Driver allowances, tolls, parking, fuel, and applicable taxes
05 nights premium accommodation across Munnar, Thekkady, Alleppey houseboat, and Kovalam
Guided spice plantation walk, tea estate trail, and honeymoon welcome amenities
Airfare or train tickets to and from Cochin, Trivandrum, or Calicut gateway
Monument entry tickets, national park fees, camera fees, and optional guide gratuities
Optional activities such as speed-boating, elephant safaris, adventure sports, and spa therapies beyond included tier
Personal expenses such as laundry, phone calls, alcoholic beverages, and tipping
